segment.source: Renders one compact product card: image with optional status badge (New, Sale), title, price with optional struck-through original price, short rich-text description, and a buy button. Use it for: a single product mention with price in the source — one featured item, a promoted article with discount, a merch spotlight. Prefer 'Product Grid Listing' for several products, 'Product Gallery Buy Panel' for detail pages with multiple photos, and 'Shop Product Hero' as a page opener.
